title: [MooreToCore] Fail to legalize moore::ArrayCreateOp in some cases

features.name: unpacked array of bit with array literal assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of bit type with a queue/array literal assignment using the '{ } syntax

features.name: unpacked array element access and assignment
features.description: Code should include unpacked array element access with assignment between two arrays

features.name: multiple unpacked arrays with zero initialization
features.description: Code should include multiple unpacked arrays of bit type where one is initialized with zero array literal and another with ones
